title: sample_brand
html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>LG Customer Care Support | Expert Repair Service</title>
    <meta name="description"
        content="LG repair services for Washing Machines, Refrigerators, Microwaves, ACs, and TVs. Certified technicians, same-day doorstep service.">

    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">

    <style>
        :root {
            --primary: #2563eb;
            --primary-dark: #1d4ed8;
            --primary-light: #3b82f6;
            --accent: #f59e0b;
            --accent-dark: #d97706;
            --dark: #111827;
            --dark2: #1f2937;
            --gray: #6b7280;
            --gray-light: #9ca3af;
            --bg: #f9fafb;
            --bg2: #f3f4f6;
            --white: #ffffff;
            --green: #22c55e;
            --radius: 10px;
        }

        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
            color: var(--dark);
            background: var(--white);
            line-height: 1.7;
        }

        a {
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        /* ===== HEADER ===== */
        .site-header {
            background: var(--white);
            box-shadow: 0 1px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 1000;
        }

        .header-wrap {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 12px 20px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .site-logo {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        .site-logo img {
            height: 42px;
            border-radius: 6px;
        }

        .site-logo-text {
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 1.15rem;
            color: var(--primary);
            line-height: 1.2;
        }

        .site-logo-text span {
            display: block;
            font-size: 0.65rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--gray);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        .site-nav {
            display: flex;
            list-style: none;
            gap: 2rem;
        }

        .site-nav a {
            color: var(--dark2);
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }

        .site-nav a:hover {
            color: var(--primary);
        }

        .header-phone {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: var(--white);
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border-radius: 50px;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .header-phone:hover {
            background: var(--primary-dark);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3);
        }

        .mob-toggle {
            display: none;
            background: var(--primary);
            color: var(--white);
            border: none;
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        /* ===== HERO ===== */
        .hero-section {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff 0%, #dbeafe 50%, #bfdbfe 100%);
            padding: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            min-height: 550px;
        }

        .hero-container {
            max-width: 100% !important;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: stretch;
            width: 100%;
            gap: 0;
        }

        .hero-content {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 80px 10% 80px 5%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .hero-image {
            flex: 1;
            position: relative;
        }

        .hero-image img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            display: block;
            border-radius: 0;
            box-shadow: none;
            border: none;
            transform: none;
        }

        .hero-section h1 {
            font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
            font-weight: 800;
            color: var(--dark);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.1;
        }

        .hero-section h1 span {
            color: var(--primary);
        }

        .hero-section p {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: #4b5563;
            margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
            max-width: 550px;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }

        .hero-btns {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1.2rem;
            justify-content: flex-start;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .btn {
            padding: 12px 28px;
            border-radius: 50px;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1rem;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            transition: all 0.25s;
            cursor: pointer;
            border: none;
        }

        .btn-blue {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .btn-blue:hover {
            background: var(--primary-dark);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3);
        }

        .btn-outline-blue {
            background: transparent;
            color: var(--primary);
            border: 2px solid var(--primary);
        }

        .btn-outline-blue:hover {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: var(--white);
        }

        /* ===== WHY CHOOSE US ===== */
        .why-section {
            padding: 70px 20px;
            background: var(--white);
        }

        .section-title {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
        }

        .section-title h2 {
            font-size: 2rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--dark);
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .section-title p {
            color: var(--gray);
            font-size: 1.05rem;
        }

        .why-grid {
            max-width: 1100px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 1.5rem;
        }

        .why-card {
            background: var(--bg);
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            padding: 30px 20px;
            text-align: center;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        }

        .why-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-6px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
            border-color: var(--primary-light);
        }

        .why-card .icon-circle {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-light));
            color: var(--white);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 1.4rem;
            margin: 0 auto 1rem;
        }

        .why-card h4 {
            font-size: 1.05rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--dark);
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .why-card p {
            font-size: 0.88rem;
            color: var(--gray);
        }

        /* ===== BRANDS / APPLIANCES ROW ===== */
        .brands-section {
            padding: 60px 20px;
            background: var(--bg2);
        }

        .brands-row {
            max-width: 1000px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 1.5rem;
        }

        .brand-item {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 25px 15px;
            background: var(--white);
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
            transition: all 0.3s;
            border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        }

        .brand-item:hover {
            transform: translateY(-4px);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
        }

        .brand-item i {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            color: var(--primary);
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            display: block;
        }

        .brand-item h5 {
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--dark);
        }

        /* ===== OUR SERVICES CARDS ===== */
        .our-services {
            padding: 80px 20px;
            background: var(--white);
        }

        .services-cards {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 2rem;
        }

        .s-card {
            background: var(--white);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 40px 30px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02);
            transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            text-align: left;
        }

        .s-card::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 5px;
            height: 100%;
            background: var(--primary);
            transform: scaleY(0);
            transition: transform 0.3s;
        }

        .s-card:hover::before {
            transform: scaleY(1);
        }

        .s-card:hover {
            box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
            transform: translateY(-8px);
            border-color: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1);
        }

        .s-card .s-icon {
            width: 65px;
            height: 65px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            background: #eff6ff;
            color: var(--primary);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.8rem;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }

        .s-card:hover .s-icon {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: var(--white);
            transform: scale(1.1) rotate(5deg);
        }

        .s-card h3 {
            font-size: 1.4rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--dark);
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            line-height: 1.3;
        }

        .s-card p {
            color: #4b5563;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            flex-grow: 1;
        }

        .s-card .s-tag {
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            color: var(--primary);
            font-weight: 600;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: auto;
            border-top: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
            padding-top: 1.5rem;
        }

        .s-card .s-tag i {
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            transition: transform 0.3s;
        }

        .s-card:hover .s-tag i {
            transform: translateX(5px);
        }

        /* ===== BLOG-STYLE REPAIR SECTIONS ===== */
        .repair-details {
            padding: 80px 20px;
            background: var(--white);
        }

        .repair-container {
            max-width: 780px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .repair-container>.section-title {
            margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
        }

        .repair-container>.section-title h2 {
            font-size: 2.2rem;
            position: relative;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        .repair-container>.section-title h2::after {
            content: '';
            display: block;
            width: 60px;
            height: 3px;
            background: var(--primary);
            margin: 12px auto 0;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }

        .blog-featured-img {
            width: 100%;
            height: clamp(250px, 40vh, 450px);
            object-fit: cover;
            border-radius: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
            box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            display: block;
        }

        .repair-block {
            background: transparent;
            border-radius: 0;
            padding: 0 0 2.5rem 0;
            margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
            box-shadow: none;
            border-left: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        }

        .repair-block:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
            margin-bottom: 0;
            padding-bottom: 0;
        }

        .repair-block h3 {
            font-size: 1.6rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--dark);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            line-height: 1.35;
        }

        .repair-block h3 i {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: var(--primary);
            background: #eff6ff;
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .repair-block .r-sub {
            color: #4b5563;
            font-size: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.8;
        }

        .repair-block p {
            color: #4b5563;
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.8;
            margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
        }

        .repair-block h4 {
            font-size: 1.05rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--dark);
            margin: 1.8rem 0 1rem;
            padding-left: 12px;
            border-left: 3px solid var(--primary);
        }

        .r-list {
            list-style: none;
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        .r-list li {
            position: relative;
            padding: 8px 16px 8px 32px;
            color: #374151;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            background: #f0f7ff;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-weight: 500;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .r-list li:hover {
            background: #dbeafe;
            transform: translateY(-1px);
        }

        .r-list li::before {
            content: "\f00c";
            font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free";
            font-weight: 900;
            position: absolute;
            left: 12px;
            color: var(--green);
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
        }

        .call-link {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-top: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--white);
            background: var(--primary);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            padding: 10px 24px;
            border-radius: 50px;
            transition: all 0.25s;
        }

        .call-link:hover {
            background: var(--primary-dark);
            color: var(--white);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3);
        }

        /* ===== LOCATIONS ===== */
        .locations-section {
            padding: 60px 20px;
            background: var(--white);
            text-align: center;
        }

        .loc-tags {
            max-width: 900px;
            margin: 1.5rem auto 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .loc-tags span {
            background: var(--bg2);
            padding: 7px 14px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: var(--dark2);
            font-weight: 500;
            border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            cursor: default;
        }

        .loc-tags span:hover {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: var(--white);
            border-color: var(--primary);
        }

        /* ===== CTA STRIP ===== */
        .cta-strip {
            padding: 50px 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary) 0%, var(--primary-dark) 100%);
            text-align: center;
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .cta-strip h2 {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .cta-strip p {
            opacity: 0.85;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            font-size: 1.05rem;
        }

        .cta-strip .phone-number {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: var(--accent);
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .cta-strip .phone-number:hover {
            color: #fbbf24;
        }

        .btn-white {
            background: var(--white);
            color: var(--primary);
            padding: 12px 30px;
            border-radius: 50px;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 1rem;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .btn-white:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        }

        /* ===== ABOUT US ===== */
        .about-section {
            padding: 70px 20px;
            background: var(--bg);
        }

        .about-wrap {
            max-width: 1100px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 3rem;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .about-text h2 {
            font-size: 2rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--dark);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .about-text p {
            color: var(--gray);
            font-size: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .about-features {
            list-style: none;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .about-features li {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            background: var(--white);
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--dark2);
            box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
        }

        .about-features li i {
            color: var(--primary);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
        }

        .about-img img {
            width: 100%;
            border-radius: 15px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
        }

        /* ===== SEO GRID ===== */
        .seo-section {
            padding: 50px 20px;
            background: var(--white);
            border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        }

        .seo-section h4 {
            text-align: center;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            color: var(--dark);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .seo-grid {
            max-width: 950px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            gap: 1px;
            background: #e5e7eb;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .seo-grid span {
            background: var(--white);
            padding: 12px 14px;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            color: var(--gray);
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .seo-grid span:hover {
            background: #eff6ff;
            color: var(--primary);
        }

        /* ===== FOOTER ===== */
        .site-footer {
            background: var(--dark);
            color: var(--white);
            padding: 50px 20px 25px;
        }

        .footer-inner {
            max-width: 1100px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .footer-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1.5fr 1fr 1fr 1.5fr;
            gap: 2.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
        }

        .f-col h4 {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--accent);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        .f-col p {
            font-size: 0.88rem;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);
            line-height: 1.7;
        }

        .f-col ul {
            list-style: none;
        }

        .f-col ul li {
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .f-col ul li a {
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
            font-size: 0.88rem;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .f-col ul li a:hover {
            color: var(--white);
            padding-left: 4px;
        }

        .footer-bottom {
            border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
            padding-top: 1.5rem;
            text-align: center;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
            line-height: 1.8;
        }

        /* ===== MOBILE BAR ===== */
        .mobile-bar {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 0;
            width: 100%;
            background: var(--primary);
            color: var(--white);
            text-align: center;
            padding: 14px;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            z-index: 2000;
        }

        /* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
        @media (max-width: 1024px) {

            .why-grid,
            .brands-row {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            }

            .about-wrap {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                text-align: center;
            }

            .about-features {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .footer-grid {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .header-wrap {
                padding: 10px 15px;
            }

            .site-logo-text {
                font-size: 1rem;
            }

            .site-nav {
                position: fixed;
                top: 62px;
                left: -100%;
                width: 100%;
                height: calc(100vh - 62px);
                background: var(--white);
                flex-direction: column;
                align-items: center;
                padding: 2rem;
                transition: 0.35s ease;
                z-index: 999;
                box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
            }

            .site-nav.active {
                left: 0;
            }

            .site-nav li {
                width: 100%;
                text-align: center;
            }

            .site-nav a {
                display: block;
                padding: 1.2rem;
                font-size: 1.1rem;
                border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bg2);
            }

            .header-phone-desk {
                display: none;
            }

            .mob-toggle {
                display: flex;
            }

            .hero-section {
                display: block;
                padding: 0;
                min-height: auto;
            }

            .hero-container {
                display: block;
            }

            .hero-content {
                padding: 40px 20px 50px;
                text-align: center;
            }

            .hero-btns {
                justify-content: center;
            }

            .hero-image {
                height: 300px;
            }

            .hero-image img {
                height: 300px;
            }

            .why-grid,
            .brands-row {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            }

            .services-cards {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 1.5rem;
            }

            .s-card {
                padding: 30px 20px;
            }

            .repair-block h3 {
                font-size: 1.3rem;
            }

            .seo-grid {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            }

            .footer-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 2rem;
            }

            .cta-strip .phone-number {
                font-size: 1.8rem;
            }

            .mobile-bar {
                display: block;
            }

            body {
                padding-bottom: 55px;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 480px) {

            .why-grid,
            .brands-row {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .seo-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .hero-section h1 {
                font-size: 1.5rem;
            }

            .f-col {
                text-align: center;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>

                    <li>Repair Center</li>

                <h4>Complete Service Coverage:</h4>
                <ul class="r-list">
                    <li>Microwave Service Center</li>

                    <li>Oven Service Center</li>
                    <li>Oven Repair</li>
                    <li>Micro Oven Service Center</li>
                    <li>Oven Customer Care</li>

            </div>

        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- CTA STRIP -->
    <section class="cta-strip" id="contact">

    <!-- SCRIPTS -->
    <script>
        const mobToggle = document.getElementById('mobToggle');
        const siteNav = document.getElementById('siteNav');
        const mobIcon = mobToggle.querySelector('i');

        mobToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
            siteNav.classList.toggle('active');
            if (siteNav.classList.contains('active')) {
                mobIcon.classList.replace('fa-bars', 'fa-times');
                document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
            } else {
                mobIcon.classList.replace('fa-times', 'fa-bars');
                document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
            }
        });

        document.querySelectorAll('.site-nav a').forEach(link => {
            link.addEventListener('click', () => {
                siteNav.classList.remove('active');
                mobIcon.classList.replace('fa-times', 'fa-bars');
                document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
            });
        });

        document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
            anchor.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
                if (target) target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
            });
        });
    </script>

</body>

</html>
